sections.paragraph: m. plur. slender threads, spiders’ webs, Isa 59:5, Isa 59:6. (Arab. قُورُ a thread made of cotton. To this answers the Greek καιxρος, licium, the cross threads in weaving, die Kreuzfäden, whence καῖρόω, καίρωσις. The etymology is rather obscure. I suppose, however, that קוּרִים is akin to the word קֹורָה a transverse beam.)
